title: Procedural Description Generation
scenario: Generate a procedural description of a fictional world, including its geography, climate, and life forms. The description should be generated using a set of specific rules and parameters.
constraints: Must use a consistent narrative voice and tense
Must include at least three procedural elements (e.g. geography, climate, life forms)

evaluationCriteria.description: Check the correctness of the procedural logic used to generate the description.
Verify that the description meets the word count and narrative voice requirements.
Evaluate the number of procedural elements present in the description.
